counters.description: only scary in the hands of a skilled player which is why you see so few of them. very dangerous if used well, play with caution. remember this "red white dont fight". his strongest gun combination is red and white.
her passive slow counteracts our speed and she has a stun. ashe is harmful to our health. play with extreme caution.

playable but not really a fun time. her trap will ruin your life while you're trying to revive. oppressive to lane against. i have a lot of success stunning her by throwing the initial bomb on her, then throwing the second behind her because any decent cait player will try to e backwards out of your stun. nice way to catch her off guard.

skill matchup. bard one tricks are as rare as zilean one tricks. bard can and will be on the map more than you, he has to in order to stack his passive. try to take advantage of the 2v1 or try to counter roam.
fire is dangerous. brand is fire.

zilean has one of if not the weakest early games in league of legends. draven, has one of the strongest. hopefully your adc doesn't think they're a superhero because there's a good chance you will lose.
not fun to verse, but what long range burst mage with cc is? has very long cooldowns early, abuse it when possible.
has huge early damage and cc and shields. karma is a b%$(#.

scary when fed, still annoying even when she's not. i hate being trapped while reviving. slowing her when her passive procs helps stop her melting everyone or at least from chasing your team down. avoid giving her early kills if possible and she's much easier to deal with.
dangerous when paired with hyper carry enablers like lulu, zilean, etc. he will scale eventually regardless, but not feeding him early will slow it down a lot.

cc = death. look up cc in the dictionary and you will see a picture of leona. if she hits your adc you have a chance to counter cc the enemy adc. if she hits you, hopefully you get 0.02 of a second spare to ult yourself. try to position yourself so she can't freely engage.

filthy, disgustingly oppressive, low skill high impact champion. this is a very unfavourable matchup. if she has a cait or ezreal adc enjoy playing under tower your entire laning phase. pray to the jungle gods for a jungler that recognises when a lane is gankable and take advantage or you will fall behind.
count the minions. bombs will blow her cover. on the off chance you get duped, scream help.
more annoying than blitzcrank because he's not useless when he misses q. anyone that can lock you down is a threat. make him hit your adc instead :d

very annoying. cc and heals in one roll of sushi. if i see lucian nami i dodge. not really but i wish i dodged after losing my lp. her damage and sustain are both quite high making her a handful in lane.

i don't dodge games, because every game is winnable, but if i was going to dodge a game rakan would be one of the reasons why. rakan is 1 of 2 champions that are the most extreme match ups for zilean. pyke is the other. he can completely ruin your life and his cc is more annoying than even leona's plus he's extremely mobile.

i don't dodge games, because every game is winnable, but if i was going to dodge a game pyke would be one of the reasons why. pyke is 1 of 2 champions that are the most extreme match ups for zilean. rakan is the other. his kit is just built to make your life hard. hooks, stuns and stealth. why riot? he can and will roam 10x better than you. the only saving grace is that when you ult someone he tried to execute, despite him "killing" your ally, it does not count as a kill and therefor does not reset his ult. take that.
point click stun. why does that still exist? i don't need to write any more. luckily it's barely played support anymore.
take exhaust. her w stopping bombs ticks me off. lol bomb joke. you can speed yourself and simply walk out of her ultimate if need be.

rell is not a nice lady, and a good one will make your life very hard in lane because she wants to play aggressively from the moment she see's you. don't make eye contact and hope she goes away. plot twist, she wont.
only a threat if he get's a lead. beware his e damage and get ready to ult low hp allies. double bomb him immediately when coming out of stealth and either get distance or demolish him.
high skill cap, but this is downright unplayable if they've invested the time. as always, make sure he hits your adc instead. play around minions. hook will spell your doom.

i wish the kench would get back on the bench. he doesn't die, he does too much damage for a full tank. if you're quick you can stun him before he can w in/out. not unwinnable, but very annoying at every stage of the game.
if they're good at trigonometry (they always seem to be. nerds) then it's a threat.  suddenly turning around at random times can be a helpful way of dodging his q ability.
heavily depends on the skill of the player. don't stand in the feather path back to her. very strong if fed early.
out ranges you. out damages you. however he's an immobile champion and easy to kill with jungle assistance. painful to lane against.
the only person that can beat us is us.
no real surprise here. mel is a busted champion currently and will hopefully be nerfed soon. adc or support doesn't matter.

synergies.description: there is not a single champion in league of legends that does not benefit from zilean's kit. speed, slow, stun, revive. it's impossible not to like zilean when it's used for your benefit. zilean plays well with others.
there is not a single champion in league of legends that does not benefit from zilean's kit.
